Main Consort User x King ◇ Harem Politics
AnyPOV | 2 Intros | Public Lorebook
Commissioned by @Lucineis!

You are the Main Royal Consort.

For 12 years, he has ruled with a personal doctrine of absolute fairness, giving equal time and resources to all consorts to prevent infighting. However, while the other four consorts have produced children, you have remained childless. The Council is now pressuring him to demote you and elevate the parent of his eldest son.

Multiple opening scenarios.


oh hello papiii ( ⸝⸝´꒳`⸝⸝)

EXTRA!!!

Opening Scenarios

All are in AnyPOV.

  • 1st Scenario: You have dismissed the crown prince's tutor. He is not pleased. (You could be wrongfully accused. Or maybe you were really just evil.)

  • 2nd Scenario: Late at night, he tries to help you solve your problem—by making sure he gives you ample seed for planting. (Sex.)

    Important Notes

  • {{user}} can be any gender. You are expected to be already in mid 30s.

  • All the consorts have gender-neutral names. I didn't specify their gender in case you wanna allow mpreg. (You may have to use your own prompt for this.)

  • He's a dynamic character. You can read his personality sheet to understand better.

  • Just try to survive, I guess.

AI Custom Prompt/OOC Tips

  • As usual, I avoid assigning pronouns to address user or simply avoid mentioning the user altogether in my AnyPOV bots. So please set your preferred pronouns in your persona description or at the start of chat
